0.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{showTextbox}On the day of the incident, I told the two of them to be on the 4th floor of the event hall at 10:00 PM.

1.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{showTextbox}After finishing my work, I sat down on the 1st-floor stage and waited for the time to come.

2.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{showTextbox}When I happened to look up at the 4th floor, I saw the victim and the defendant.

3.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{showTextbox}Then, the defendant approached the victim without any hesitation and pushed her right off!

0.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{hideCharacter}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{fadeBg:Byrde_Samurai}{showTextbox}This is the sequence of photos{nl}I took at that moment.

1.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{hideCharacter}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{bg:Byrde_Samurai}{showTextbox}I heard voices arguing,{nl}so I instinctively took out my cell phone and took some pictures.

2.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{hideCharacter}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{fadeBg:Byrde_Samurai2}{showTextbox}Here, please look.{nl}The defendant is pushing the victim as she sits on the railing.

3.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{hideCharacter}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{fadeBg:Byrde_Samurai3}{showTextbox}From the looks of it,{nl}the victim must have landed face-first on the ground.

4.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{fadeInCharacter:600}{fadeInBg:600}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{showTextbox}The victim fell face-first and flipped over.{nl}The blow to the back of the head was from the second impact.

0.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_alegro,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{showTextbox}I finished my work around 9:15 PM,{nl}and after that, I stayed on the 1st-floor stage the entire time.

1.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_alegro,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{showTextbox}You might suspect me, but{nl}you are making a massive misunderstanding.

3.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_alegro,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{showTextbox}There is no way{nl}I could have pushed anyone.

4.text: {startBGM:interrogatory_alegro,true}{showLifeBar}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1,true}{color:lime}{showTextbox}Between 9:15 PM and the incident,{nl}there was not a single strange occurrence.

CE2_MaskChoice.name: Phoenix
CE2_MaskChoice.text: (In other words, this is what happened!)

options.text: The victim fell without wearing the mask
options.label: CE2_Option_Correct

options.text: The victim fell wearing the mask
options.label: CE2_Option_Wrong_2

options.text: The victim fell willingly on her own
options.label: CE2_Option2_Wrong_1

CE3_1.name: Phoenix
CE3_1.text: {showLifeBar:2}{hideCharacter}{bg:Byrde_Samurai}{color:lightblue}(What could it be...{nl}Something definitely catches my eye...)

options.text: There are a lot of fingerprints on it
options.label: CE3_1_Option_Wrong_3

CE3_2.name: Phoenix
CE3_2.text: {showLifeBar:2}{courtView:defense}This is a vital point.{nl}It means the defendant...

CE1_Hint.name: Maya
CE1_Hint.text: {hideLifeBar}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2,true}Hold on, Nick!{nl}This is the important part! Calm down!

CE1_Hint.name: Phoenix
CE1_Hint.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(She's right. Calm down...{p:200} I need to stay calm.{nl}This testimony clearly has a contradiction!)

CE1_Hint.name: Phoenix
CE1_Hint.text: {color:lightblue}(But how should I break it apart...?)

CE1_Hint.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Hint.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}Defense,{p:150} the defendant's guilt is obvious.{nl}You should stop struggling and admit defeat.

CE1_Hint.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Hint.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}Then the head and co-head of the law offices{nl}can go have a fun time at the amusement park.

CE1_Hint.name: Maya
CE1_Hint.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Determined_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Prosecutor Edgeworth...{p:200} Is he still holding a grudge{nl}over what I said earlier...?

CE1_Hint.name: Phoenix
CE1_Hint.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(...Maggey said she reached her hand out{nl}without knowing what was in the darkness.)

CE1_Hint.name: Phoenix
CE1_Hint.text: {color:lightblue}(That must be because Maggey{nl}didn't have THAT with her at the time.)

CE1_Victory.text: {stopBGM:false}{hideTextbox}{blip:0,false}{skip:0}

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {playSound:PhoenixObjection}{playAnimation:Objection}{p:500}{courtSprite:defense["HoldingDocument"]}{courtPan:defense}{p:600}{skip:0}

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {showTextbox}{blip:1,true}Your Honor.{nl}Please take a look at this.

CE1_Victory.name: Judge
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:judge["Surprised"]}{flash}{playSound:cling}{courtView:judge}And what is that?

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {hideLifeBar}{courtView:defense}{showEvidenceIcon:right,blog_post_charm_updated}This is a photo of the defendant's glasses,{nl}taken before the incident.

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: Actually, these glasses were lost right before the incident.{nl}It was around 9:30 PM.

CE1_Victory.name: Judge
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{hideEvidenceIcon}{courtView:judge}{p:100}{courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{showTextbox}Hmm?{nl}Is this true, defendant?

CE1_Victory.name: Maggey
CE1_Victory.text: {courtChar:witness,Maggey}{courtSprite:witness["Determined"]}{courtView:witness}{playSound:shake}{shake:250}{blip:2}I-It's true, sir!{nl}While I was taking a shower in the waiting room, they completely disappeared, sir!

CE1_Victory.name: Maggey
CE1_Victory.text: {playSound:shake}{shake:250}They are still missing even now.{nl}The ones I'm wearing are my spares, sir!

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}Her eyesight is extremely poor.{nl}Furthermore, she has astigmatism.

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: According to the testimony,{nl}the defendant approached the victim without hesitation and pushed her.

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}But would that even be possible{nl}for someone with such bad eyesight?

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{startBGM:objection}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{showTextbox}There's a chance she could have fallen over herself.{nl}Isn't that unnatural?
{setSkipEnabled:false}{hideTextbox}{courtView:overview}{playSound:galleryReaction}{p:1200}{playAnimation:Gavel}{setSkipEnabled:true}{skip:0}

CE1_Victory.name: Judge
CE1_Victory.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Nod"]}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{blip:1}The defense does have a point.

CE1_Victory.name: Maya
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}You did it!{p:100}{nl}Nick!

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Determined"]}{showTextbox}{blip:1}...{p:300}Hold on.

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{courtSprite:prosecution["Wagging_finger"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}{showTextbox}The loss of the glasses is merely the defendant's claim.{nl}Do you have any concrete proof?

CE1_Victory.name: Maya
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Determined_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{flash}{playSound:question1}{stopBGM:true}{blip:2}What's that...{p:200}{nl}Prosecutor Edgeworth is smiling...

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}You're right...{p:200}{nl}It's kind of creepy...

CE1_Victory.name: Maya
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Thinking_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Maybe he's imagining himself playing at the amusement park...

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Thinking"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}The defendant walked right up to the railing.{nl}That is clearly established by the witness testimony.

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: In other words, she was actually wearing her glasses.

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: And she walked normally through the darkness{nl}and shoved the victim over the railing.

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: Is that not what happened?

CE1_Victory.name: Maggey
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:witness["Determined"]}{courtView:witness}{playSound:shake}{shake:250}{blip:2}My glasses really did disappear, sir.{nl}I really was walking blind, sir!

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}Then perhaps you had your spare glasses with you at the time?

CE1_Victory.name: Maggey
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:witness["Determined"]}{courtView:witness}{playSound:shake}{shake:250}{blip:2}I only keep my spares at home, sir!

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Determined"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}But you were able to walk to the railing.

CE1_Victory.name: Maggey
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:witness["Sad"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:2}Y-Yes...{p:300}{p:200}{nl}I managed to walk somehow without my glasses, sir...

CE1_Victory.name: Judge
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Please continue.{nl}Since we are on the topic, let us hear the rest.

CE1_Victory.name: Maggey
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:witness["Sad"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:2}I was walking blindly without my glasses, sir...{p:300}{nl}Then I saw what looked like a faint shadow...

CE1_Victory.name: Maggey
CE1_Victory.text: I called out, but there was no answer,{nl}so I reached my hand out, sir.

CE1_Victory.name: Maggey
CE1_Victory.text: Then I heard the sound of something falling below{nl}and Mr. Sahwit's scream, sir...

CE1_Victory.name: Judge
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Nod"]}{courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{blip:1}{startBGM:courtroom}Hmm...{p:300}{nl}Then I believe this is settled.

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}Urgh...

CE1_Victory.name: Maya
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick...{p:200}{nl}We're going to lose at this rate...

CE1_Victory.name: Judge
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Let us proceed to the verdict,{nl}and we can all head out to the amusement park...

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtView:defense}{p:250}{courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{showTextbox}Please wait, Your Honor!

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: T-The {p:200}defendant... might have dropped something else{nl}instead of the victim!

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {flash}{playSound:question1}{courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}{courtView:prosecution}Oho.{nl}Like what, for example?

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {playSound:shake}{shake:250}{courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}W-Well...{nl}What could it be...

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {courtView:prosecution}She dropped something else, yet a dead body{nl}fell in front of the witness. That makes no sense.

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}This is not an amusement park attraction, you know.{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident_Shrugging"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}

CE1_Victory.name: Judge
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Nod"]}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{showTextbox}That is certainly true.

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {stopBGM:false}{playSound:shake}{shake:250}{courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}Ugh...

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Normal"]}{courtView:prosecution}Your Honor.{nl}Let me speak plainly.

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{courtSprite:prosecution["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Determined"]}{showTextbox}The defense is trying to make this murder look like an accident by pretending the defendant couldn't see.

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{playSound:PhoenixObjection}{playAnimation:Objection}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtPan:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{showTextbox}You have no proof of that either!

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Wagging_finger"]}{flash}{playSound:question1}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}{showTextbox}I do have proof.

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {hideTextbox}{courtView:defense}{flash}{courtSprite:defense["Damage"]}{courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{showTextbox}{blip:1}{startBGM:tension}Eeeek!

CE1_Victory.name: Edgeworth
CE1_Victory.text: {courtView:prosecution}The witness has submitted photos taken at the time.{nl}Everything is captured right there.

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {playSound:question1}{flash}{courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}Photos?{nl}I haven't heard anything about this...

CE1_Victory.name: Maya
CE1_Victory.text: {courtView:cocounsel}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}Nick, this is really bad!

CE1_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE1_Victory.text: {courtView:defense}Uuuugh.{p:200}{nl}Let's just hear what he has to say for now.
{hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{fadeOutBg:600}{jump:Second_Testimony_Start}{sectionEnd}

CE2_Hint.name: Maya
CE2_Hint.text: {hideLifeBar}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Thinking_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{showCharacter}{blip:2,true}Nick. If she hit the back of her head,{nl}wouldn't there be some kind of mark on the back of the mask the victim was wearing?

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}Isn't it possible the victim was dropped without the mask beforehand, and suffered the fatal blow to the back of the head then?{hideLifeBar}{startBGM:objection}

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Edgeworth
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Thinking"]}{courtView:prosecution}{flash}{playSound:question1}What!?

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:defense["HoldingDocument"]}{courtView:defense}Look at the autopsy report.{nl}The estimated time of death is between 9:30 PM and 10:30 PM.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: That means there is nothing strange about the victim{nl}being killed before 10:05 PM.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: The defendant stated that she heard a loud noise{nl}outside the waiting room at around 9:30 PM.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: The victim must have been dropped and killed{nl}at that precise moment!

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Judge
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:judge["Surprised"]}{courtView:judge}{flash}{playSound:cling}{blip:1}My word...

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{blip:1}And then at 10:05 PM, she fell face-first a second time,{nl}this time wearing the mask.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: This is proven by the fact that only the eyebrow section{nl}of the mask is dented.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:defense["Confident"]}...Thinking about it this way, the cause of death{nl}and the undamaged back of the mask perfectly align!
{setSkipEnabled:false}{hideTextbox}{courtView:overview}{playSound:galleryReaction}{p:1200}{setSkipEnabled:true}{skip:0}

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{showTextbox}Then it becomes a question of{nl}who dropped her beforehand...

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: The defendant was taking a shower{nl}in the waiting room starting around 9:30 PM.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {hideTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{showTextbox}Meaning the defendant didn't commit any murder!{nl}The real culprit is someone else!

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {bg:speedlines}{courtSprite:defense["ZoomIn"]}{playSound:bubble_sfx}Is this not the true reality of the incident!?
{stopBGM:true}{setSkipEnabled:false}{hideTextbox}{courtView:overview}{playSound:galleryReaction}{p:1200}{setSkipEnabled:true}{skip:0}

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(...{p:300}Alright! I feel like I just took{nl}a massive step closer to the truth!)

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Maya
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {color:white}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Way to go, Nick!{nl}Talk about a turnabout!

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Edgeworth
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {hideTextbox}{playSound:EdgeworthObjection}{playAnimation:Objection}{courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Determined"]}{showTextbox}{blip:1}That is nothing but conjecture! You cannot prove{nl}that she fell before putting on the mask!

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Judge
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {hideTextbox}{courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Nod"]}{courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{blip:1}{showTextbox}Hmm...{p:300} Let me ask one thing as well.{nl}Why are you concluding that she was 'dropped'?

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Judge
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: Even if she had been murdered beforehand,{nl}could there not be other methods of murder?

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {hideTextbox}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Nodding"]}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{showTextbox}{startBGM:courtroom}{blip:1}You make a fair point, Your Honor.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: But I believe going out of their way to drop her twice{nl}reveals the real culprit's intentions and circumstances.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: Your Honor. I request to cross-examine{nl}Mr. Sahwit one more time.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: I intend to prove everything,{nl}including that very point.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Sahwit
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {hideTextbox}{courtSprite:witness["Nervous"]}{courtPan:witness}{blip:1}{showTextbox}A-Are we still continuing?{nl}Isn't it about time for the verdict...?

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {flash}{playSound:question1}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}Mr. Sahwit.{nl}What are you so afraid of?

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: Your hair has been twitching unnaturally for a while now...{p:200}{nl}You're acting very strangely!

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Edgeworth
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {hideTextbox}{playSound:EdgeworthObjection}{playAnimation:Objection}{courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Determined"]}{showTextbox}{blip:1}It is true that his hair{nl}frequently shows unnatural movements.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Edgeworth
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {bg:speedlines_right}{courtSprite:prosecution["ZoomIn"]}{playSound:bubble_sfx}But that has absolutely zero causal relationship{nl}with him acting strangely!

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Sahwit
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:witness["Damage_Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1}The defense attorney is suspecting me as the culprit!{nl}I find that highly offensive!

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtView:defense}Your Honor.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {hideTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{showTextbox}Please allow me to cross-examine Mr. Sahwit regarding his blank 50 minutes between 9:15 PM and the incident.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: If we do that, we should find out whether{nl}Mr. Sahwit is truly innocent,{nl}and whether my theory is correct.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Judge
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Very well.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Judge
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: I will allow the continued cross-examination of Mr. Sahwit.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Sahwit
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:witness["Nervous"]}{courtView:witness}H...{p:200}Hmph, bring it on.

CE2_Option2_Correct.name: Sahwit
CE2_Option2_Correct.text: {courtSprite:witness["Damage_Stand"]}If you're going to doubt me that much,{nl}I will prove my innocence out of sheer pride!
{jump:Third_Testimony_Start}{sectionEnd}

CE2_Option2_MiaHint.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_MiaHint.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(This is bad...{p:200} What would Mia think{nl}in a situation like this?)

CE2_Option2_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE2_Option2_MiaHint.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Mia_Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInCharacter}{showTextbox}{blip:2,true}Phoenix. Think back to the 'loud noise'{nl}that Maggey heard around 9:30 PM.

CE2_Option2_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE2_Option2_MiaHint.text: What if something else fell at that time,{nl}other than the victim falling at 10:05 PM?

CE2_Option2_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE2_Option2_MiaHint.text: Who's to say the victim only fell once?

CE2_Option2_Timer.name: Judge
CE2_Option2_Timer.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Defense?{nl}What's the matter, zoning out like that?

CE2_Option2_Timer.name: Judge
CE2_Option2_Timer.text: {courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}We are in the middle of a trial.{nl}Please answer properly within the time limit.{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE2_Option2_Wrong_1.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Wrong_1.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}The victim willingly fell on her own!

CE2_Option2_Wrong_1.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Wrong_1.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}Ummm...{p:200} Because she really liked{nl}high places... maybe?

CE2_Option2_Wrong_1.name: Maya
CE2_Option2_Wrong_1.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Exasperated_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick... that's taking things{nl}a bit too far!{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE2_Option2_Wrong_3.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option2_Wrong_3.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}Yes! The first time on her face, the second time on the back of her head,{nl}and the third time...{p:200} um...

CE2_Option2_Wrong_3.name: Maya
CE2_Option2_Wrong_3.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Exasperated_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick... falling a third time{nl}is really stretching it, don't you think?{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}The victim was dropped while she wasn't wearing the mask, and that's when she received the severe blow to the back of her head!

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Edgeworth
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {hideLifeBar}{hideTextbox}{courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident_Shrugging"]}{flash}{playSound:question1}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}{showTextbox}{blip:1}...{p:300}Hmph.{p:200}{nl}I am so appalled I have no words.

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Edgeworth
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {startBGM:tension}{courtSprite:prosecution["Holding_Doc"]}The photo of her falling proves{nl}that the victim WAS wearing the mask.

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(But then why would she flip over{nl}and leave the back of the mask undamaged...?)

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {color:lightblue}(Damn it...{p:200}{nl}I was so close to the truth of the incident...)

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Maya
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick, when you're in trouble, calm down{nl}and organize your information. That's the key!

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(Organize my information?{nl}...{p:200}Maybe I should review the evidence again.)

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {color:lightblue}(Why was there such a loud noise...?{nl}That is a huge clue!)

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {color:lightblue}(Maya, thank you.{nl}I will buy you a year's supply of ramen at Joypolis.)

CE2_Option_Correct.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Correct.text: {courtSprite:defense["HoldingDocument"]}It's true that the photo of her falling proves{nl}the victim was wearing the mask.

CE2_Option_Menu.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Menu.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(How the victim struck{nl}the back of her head...)

CE2_Option_Menu.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Menu.text: {color:lightblue}(That is proven by the fact that{nl}the back of the mask is undamaged...)

CE2_Option_MiaHint.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_MiaHint.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(This is bad...{p:200} What would Mia think{nl}in a situation like this?)

CE2_Option_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE2_Option_MiaHint.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Mia_Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInCharacter}{showTextbox}{blip:2,true}The victim had an injury on the back of her head,{nl}but the back of the mask had no damage.

CE2_Option_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE2_Option_MiaHint.text: In other words, the victim was in a state where{nl}she wasn't wearing the mask...

CE2_Option_Timer.name: Maya
CE2_Option_Timer.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}Nick, we can all go there together{nl}after the trial is over!

CE2_Option_Timer.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Timer.text: {courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtView:defense}Oh, right. I lost my focus for a second...

CE2_Option_Timer.name: Judge
CE2_Option_Timer.text: {courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Defense. We are in the middle of a trial.{nl}Please answer properly within the time limit.{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE2_Option_Wrong_2.name: Judge
CE2_Option_Wrong_2.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:judge["Thinking"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Excuse me?{nl}I don't understand what you're saying...

CE2_Option_Wrong_3.name: Phoenix
CE2_Option_Wrong_3.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}So, you see, the victim wore a massive mask...{nl}I mean, a mask-ive mass...

CE2_Option_Wrong_3.name: Maya
CE2_Option_Wrong_3.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick...{p:200} I don't think this is the time{nl}for lame puns.{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE2_Present_mask.name: Phoenix
CE2_Present_mask.text: {showLifeBar:2}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(The evidence pointing out the contradiction in his testimony{nl}is THIS!){present:mask_photo,CE2_Victory,CE2_WrongEvidence}{sectionEnd}

CE2_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE2_Victory.text: {showTextbox}{showEvidenceIcon:right,mask_photo}{courtSprite:defense["HoldingDocument"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1,true}This is the Steel Samurai mask{nl}the victim was wearing at the time of the incident.

CE2_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE2_Victory.text: {courtView:defense}If she flipped over and hit the back of her head like you testified,{nl}wouldn't the topknot be broken?

CE2_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE2_Victory.text: {courtView:defense}But as you can see, the topknot is completely intact.

CE2_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE2_Victory.text: On top of that, there isn't a single scratch or dent{nl}on the back of the mask!

CE2_Victory.name: Phoenix
CE2_Victory.text: {courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}{playSound:bubble_sfx}The witness's current testimony is full of contradictions!

CE2_Victory.name: Judge
CE2_Victory.text: {courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}I see...{p:300}{nl}There is a contradiction in the testimony.

CE2_Victory.name: Judge
CE2_Victory.text: {blip:1}Then how does the defense believe{nl}the victim struck the back of her head?

CE2_WrongEvidence.name: Maya
CE2_WrongEvidence.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Exasperated_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick, we can all go there together{nl}after the trial is over!

CE2_WrongEvidence.name: Phoenix
CE2_WrongEvidence.text: {courtView:defense}{blip:1}Oh, right. I lost my focus for a second...

CE2_WrongEvidence.name: Judge
CE2_WrongEvidence.text: {courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Defense. We are in the middle of a trial.{nl}Please answer properly within the time limit.{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE3_1_Option_MiaHint.name: Phoenix
CE3_1_Option_MiaHint.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(This is bad...{p:200} What would Mia think{nl}in a situation like this?)

CE3_1_Option_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE3_1_Option_MiaHint.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Mia_Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInCharacter}{showTextbox}{blip:2,true}What you really need to look at in this photo{nl}is not what you can see, but what you can't see.

CE3_1_Option_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE3_1_Option_MiaHint.text: Think about why the defendant's face isn't visible.{nl}Your next move should become clear.

CE3_1_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_1_Option_Right.text: {showCharacter}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Nod"]}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{blip:1}That's it... This photo{nl}doesn't show the defendant's face!

CE3_1_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_1_Option_Right.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}Regarding this photo,{nl}why isn't the defendant's face visible?

CE3_1_Option_Right.name: Edgeworth
CE3_1_Option_Right.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}What are you talking about?{nl}What does it matter if her face isn't shown?

CE3_1_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_1_Option_Right.text: {showLifeBar:2}{courtView:defense}This is a vital point.{nl}It means the defendant...

CE3_1_Option_Timer.name: Judge
CE3_1_Option_Timer.text: {showTextbox}{showCharacter}{courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Defense, what is the matter?{nl}Your time is up.

CE3_1_Option_Timer.name: Phoenix
CE3_1_Option_Timer.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}N-Nothing...{nl}I was just zooming in on the photo in my head...

CE3_1_Option_Timer.name: Edgeworth
CE3_1_Option_Timer.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}{courtView:prosecution}Hmph. Trying to buy time?{nl}A meaningless silence is a sin, Wright.

CE3_1_Option_Timer.name: Maya
CE3_1_Option_Timer.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick, stop doing a mental zoom{nl}and give a proper answer!{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE3_1_Option_Wrong_2.name: Phoenix
CE3_1_Option_Wrong_2.text: {courtSprite:defense["Abashed"]}{courtView:defense}It's like the photographer Mr. Sahwit's suspicious hair gel{nl}scent is wafting from the photo...

CE3_1_Option_Wrong_3.name: Phoenix
CE3_1_Option_Wrong_3.text: {showCharacter}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}This photo has a lot of fingerprints on it.

CE3_1_Option_Wrong_3.name: Phoenix
CE3_1_Option_Wrong_3.text: {courtView:defense}Right.{nl}If it's not the fingerprints... What could it be...

CE3_2_Option_MiaHint.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_MiaHint.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(This is bad...{p:200} What would Mia think{nl}in a situation like this?)

CE3_2_Option_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE3_2_Option_MiaHint.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Mia_Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInCharacter}{showTextbox}{blip:2,true}Perhaps the reason her face wasn't shown is because{nl}it would reveal something she wanted to hide.

CE3_2_Option_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE3_2_Option_MiaHint.text: What was the defendant missing at that time...?{nl}Think about what she normally wears.

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {hideLifeBar}{stopBGM}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{blip:1}The defendant wasn't wearing her glasses at this time.

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: However, if she wasn't wearing her glasses,{nl}the whole plan would be ruined...

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}That is why you deliberately{nl}avoided showing her face, isn't it!?{startBGM:objection}

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Sahwit
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:witness}{flash}{courtSprite:witness["Damage"]}Hieeeeeeek!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Judge
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Surprised"]}{flash}{playSound:cling}What is the matter?

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Sahwit
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:witness}{courtSprite:witness["Nervous"]}N-Nothing...{nl}It is nothing at all.

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:defense}{flash}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}{playSound:bubble_sfx}...Well?{nl}Answer the question!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Edgeworth
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {hideTextbox}{playSound:EdgeworthObjection}{playAnimation:Objection}{courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}{courtPan:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Determined"]}{showTextbox}The defense is basing this argument{nl}on the premise that the defendant lost her glasses.

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Edgeworth
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {hideTextbox}{courtSprite:prosecution["Wagging_Finger"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}{showTextbox}However, that is incorrect!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Edgeworth
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:prosecution}I present the defendant's glasses as new evidence.

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {stopBGM}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Damage"]}{courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}What?{nl}What do you mean?

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Edgeworth
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Holding_Doc"]}{showEvidenceIcon:left,maggey_glasses}I present the defendant's glasses as new evidence.

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Maggey
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {hideEvidenceIcon}{courtView:witness}{courtChar:witness,Maggey}{courtSprite:witness["Determined"]}{playSound:shake}{shake:500}{blip:2}Those are definitely my glasses, sir!{nl}Where were they!?

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Edgeworth
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Thinking"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}These?{nl}They were right there in the waiting room.

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {hideTextbox}{courtView:defense}{flash}{courtSprite:defense["Damage"]}{courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{showTextbox}Whaaaat!?

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Edgeworth
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}{courtView:prosecution}We found them when we searched the room after the incident.{nl}In other words, the defendant is lying.

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Edgeworth
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {hideTextbox}{courtSprite:prosecution["Slamming_Bench"]}{bg:speedlines_right}{courtSprite:prosecution["ZoomIn"]}{playSound:bubble_sfx}{showTextbox}She pretended her glasses were missing{nl}to make her murder look like an accident!

{startBGM:tension}{setSkipEnabled:false}{hideTextbox}{courtChar:witness,Maggey}{courtSprite:witness["Normal"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Normal"]}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal_Bench"]}{courtSprite:gallery["Normal"]}{courtView:overview}{playSound:galleryReaction}{p:1200}{setSkipEnabled:true}{skip:0}

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Maggey
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {showTextbox}{courtView:witness}{courtSprite:witness["Determined"]}{playSound:shake}{shake:500}{blip:2}I'm not lying, sir!{nl}They were definitely missing, sir!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(T-This is a huge problem...)

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {color:lightblue}(If the glasses were there, then my entire premise{nl}falls apart...)

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {color:lightblue}(Could it be... is this the end...?)

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Maya
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:cocounsel}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}{blip:2}Nick!{nl}Don't give up!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Maya
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: There absolutely has to be a breakthrough!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Maya
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: Because there's no way Maggey{nl}would ever commit murder!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {blip:1,false}...{p:300}You're right.{nl}You're exactly right!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: There's no way Maggey would lie{nl}or commit murder!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {stopBGM}{courtView:defense}{color:lightblue}(...{p:300}But, where is the breakthrough...)

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{flash}{playSound:cling}I've got it! I know!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {startBGM:explanation}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}Your Honor!{nl}The defendant is not lying!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:defense}Someone definitely took her glasses{nl}at that time!

CE3_2_Option_Right.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Right.text: {courtView:defense}The defense presents the evidence to prove it!
{jump:CE3_Present_Evidence_2}{sectionEnd}

CE3_2_Option_Timer.name: Judge
CE3_2_Option_Timer.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Defense, we still have no answer.{nl}Please answer within the time limit.

CE3_2_Option_Timer.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Timer.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}S-Sorry!{nl}I'm just one step away from finding the right words...

CE3_2_Option_Timer.name: Maya
CE3_2_Option_Timer.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Exasperated_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick, don't keep it inside your head.{nl}Say it out loud!

CE3_2_Option_Timer.name: Judge
CE3_2_Option_Timer.text: {courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}{courtView:judge}Even one step away, time is up.{nl}I am penalizing you.{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE3_2_Option_Wrong_2.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Wrong_2.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}The defendant wasn't there...{nl}That's why her face isn't in the picture!

CE3_2_Option_Wrong_2.name: Edgeworth
CE3_2_Option_Wrong_2.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}{courtView:prosecution}Defense.{nl}How do you photograph someone who isn't even there?

CE3_2_Option_Wrong_2.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Wrong_2.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}Ah... well, that's...{nl}{color:lightblue}(Now that he points it out, he's absolutely right.)

CE3_2_Option_Wrong_2.name: Maya
CE3_2_Option_Wrong_2.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Exasperated_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick... that doesn't explain{nl}the photo itself at all!{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE3_2_Option_Wrong_3.name: Phoenix
CE3_2_Option_Wrong_3.text: {showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}The defendant didn't like the victim!{nl}That's why she didn't show her face!

CE3_2_Option_Wrong_3.name: Judge
CE3_2_Option_Wrong_3.text: {courtSprite:judge["Surprised"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}D-Didn't like her!?{nl}Is that necessary information for this court?

CE3_2_Option_Wrong_3.name: Edgeworth
CE3_2_Option_Wrong_3.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Thinking"]}{courtView:prosecution}Ngh... enough of this.{nl}Are you trying to waste my time?

CE3_2_Option_Wrong_3.name: Maya
CE3_2_Option_Wrong_3.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick, stop bringing up gossip{nl}and think about the motive for the incident!{lifeMod:-2}{playSound:explosion}

CE3_Final_Present_Evidence_MiaHint.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Present_Evidence_MiaHint.text: {showTextbox}{hideLifeBar}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(This is bad...{p:200} What would Mia think{nl}in a situation like this?)

CE3_Final_Present_Evidence_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE3_Final_Present_Evidence_MiaHint.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Mia_Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInCharacter}{blip:2,true}{showTextbox}To expose the witness's lie, it's best to show{nl}the time when BOTH glasses charms were attached.

CE3_Final_Present_Evidence_MiaHint.name: Mia
CE3_Final_Present_Evidence_MiaHint.text: You have a piece of evidence that shows that, don't you?

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {stopBGM:false}{hideLifeBar}{hideTextbox}{blip:1}{playSound:PhoenixTakeThat}{playAnimation:TakeThat}{showTextbox}{courtView:defense}{showEvidenceIcon:right,blog_post_charm_updated}{courtSprite:defense["HoldingDocument"]}This is a blog post{nl}uploaded by the defendant.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {courtView:defense}Please verify that both glasses charms are attached,{nl}and then look at the upload date and time.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {courtView:defense}September 17, 9:27 PM...{p:300}{nl}Which is right before the incident.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {courtView:defense}In other words, picking up the glasses charm{nl}somewhere on the morning of the incident is impossible!

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Sahwit
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {hideEvidenceIcon}{courtView:witness}{startBGM:cornered2}{flash}Guh...

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Confident"]}That's fine.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: Shall I request a fingerprint analysis{nl}on this glasses charm right now?

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {courtSprite:defense["Objecting"]}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}Because I'm sure the defendant's fingerprints will be on it.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Sahwit
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {setSkipEnabled:false}{stopBGM}{courtView:witness}{hideTextbox}{courtSprite:witness["Breakdown"]}{flash}{playSound:damage}{p:250}{flash}{playSound:damage}{p:250}{flash}{playSound:damage}{p:250}{flash}{playSound:damage}{p:150}{flash}{playSound:damage}{p:150}{flash}{playSound:damage}{p:150}{flash}{playSound:damage}{p:100}{flash}{playSound:damage}{p:100}{showTextbox}{courtSprite:witness["Fall"]}Waaaaaaaaaah!{p:300}{playSound:hit}{shake:800}
{hideTextbox}{courtChar:witness,none}{courtView:overview}{playSound:galleryReaction}{p:1200}{setSkipEnabled:true}{skip:0}

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {showTextbox}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}You stated that you were on the 1st floor the entire time{nl}during the incident, but that is a lie.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}You went up to the 4th floor, confronted the victim{nl}for some reason, and pushed her to her death.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: The loud noise caused by that fall{nl}is what reached the showering defendant's ears.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}You returned to the 1st floor, and carried the victim,{nl}who died instantly from the severe blow to the back of the head, up to the 4th floor.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: You put the Steel Samurai mask on her{nl}and sat her on the railing.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: Then you sneaked into the waiting room{nl}and stole the showering defendant's glasses.

CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix
CE3_Final_Right_Evidence.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}You calculated that the defendant,{nl}with her poor eyesight,{nl}would push the victim just by touching her.

CE3_Right_Evidence.name: Phoenix

Court_Opening.name: Judge
Court_Opening.text: {showTextbox}{setSkipEnabled:true}{startBGM:courtroom,true}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Court is now in session for the trial of{nl}Maggey Byrde.

Court_Opening.name: Phoenix
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:1}The defense is ready,{p:150} Your Honor.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Normal"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}The prosecution is{p:300}{textSpeed:150}... {p:500}{textSpeed:50}ready, as always.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}The defendant has practically confessed.{nl}Let us keep this brief.

Court_Opening.name: Judge
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Very well, {p:150}Mr. Edgeworth.{nl}Your opening statement, please.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Holding_Doc"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}The incident took place at Joypolis...{p:300}{nl}It occurred on September 17.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {fadeOutCharacter}{fadeOutBg:300}{fadeBg:Crime_Scene,300}{startBGM:explanation}The victim, Kurumi Nakaki, who worked there as a suit actor, was found dead.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: The location was the 1st-floor stage of the event hall.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: Right before the eyes of the first discoverer,{nl}Frank Sahwit, the defendant pushed the victim from the 4th floor.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{fadeBg:Byrde_Kurumi}{showTextbox}The victim and the defendant were on bad terms.{nl}Everyone at the theater knew this.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: Furthermore, the defendant has admitted{nl}to pushing her.

Court_Opening.name: Phoenix
Court_Opening.text: She merely thinks that, given the flow of events,{nl}she might have pushed her by accident!

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}{courtView:prosecution}What difference does it make?{nl}It amounts to the exact same thing.

Court_Opening.name: Phoenix
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}Urgh.{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}{nl}(I can't argue with that...)

Court_Opening.name: Judge
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:judge["Thinking"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}...{p:300}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}Hmm.{nl}Mr. Edgeworth, please continue.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Holding_Doc"]}The time the body was discovered by the first witness{nl}was 10:05 PM.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: The estimated time of death is between{nl}9:30 PM and 10:30 PM.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: The cause of death was a severe blow to the back of the head due to falling from the 4th floor. It was a cerebral contusion.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: The details are recorded in the autopsy report.{nl}That is all.
{blip:0,false}{addEvidence:autopsy_report,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{color:lightblue}Please add the data from the {Autopsy Report}{nl}to the Court Record.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {blip:1}Today, I have summoned the first discoverer{nl}who witnessed all of this.

Court_Opening.name: Judge
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{courtView:judge}Understood.{nl}Mr. Edgeworth, please call your witness to the stand.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Normal"]}{courtView:prosecution}The event hall supervisor at Joypolis,{nl}Frank Sahwit.{courtChar:witness,Shawit}

{stopBGM:true}{hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:600}{fadeOutCharacter}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{fadeInCharacter:500}{fadeInBg:500}{showTextbox}{center}{color:red}{blip:0,false}--The Situation at the Time of the Incident--{playAnimation:Witness_Testimony}{color:white}

Court_Opening.name: Sahwit
Court_Opening.text: {showTestimonyIndicator}{startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,false}{blip:1}On the day of the incident, I told the two of them to be on the 4th floor of the event hall at 10:00 PM.

Court_Opening.name: Sahwit
Court_Opening.text: After finishing my work, I sat down on the 1st-floor stage and waited for the time to come.

Court_Opening.name: Sahwit
Court_Opening.text: When I happened to look up at the 4th floor, I saw the victim and the defendant.

Court_Opening.name: Sahwit
Court_Opening.text: Then, the defendant approached the victim without any hesitation and pushed her right off!

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {hideTestimonyIndicator}{fadeOutBg:800}{fadeOutFg:800}{fadeOutCharacter:800}{stopBGM:true}{courtPan:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}{fadeInCharacter:1400}{fadeInBg:600}{fadeInFg:600}{blip:1}Your Honor, what do you think?{nl}Is the defendant's guilt not obvious?

Court_Opening.name: Phoenix
Court_Opening.text: {hideTextbox}{playSound:PhoenixObjection}{playAnimation:Objection}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{p:500}{courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{p:300}{showTextbox}{blip:1}Hold on a second!{nl}The trial has only just begun!

Court_Opening.name: Maya
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Determined_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}...{p:300}Wait, could it be that Mr. Edgeworth took a liking to Joypolis during his investigation?

Court_Opening.name: Maya
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Normal_Bench"]}And you're thinking about wrapping up the trial quickly{nl}so you can go play?

Court_Opening.name: Judge
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:judge["Surprised"]}{courtView:judge}{flash}{playSound:cling}{blip:1}Oho, {p:400}an amusement park that even catches{nl}Mr. Edgeworth's interest?{nl}I would like to go there myself.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Damage"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Dismayed"]}{blip:1}What nonsense are you spouting?{nl}It is nothing of the sort.

Court_Opening.name: Edgeworth
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:prosecution["Determined"]}It simply means that this trial is so clear-cut{nl}that it will be over shortly.

Court_Opening.name: Phoenix
Court_Opening.text: {courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(Like hell I'll let it end quickly.{nl}There's no way Maggey would commit murder!)
{fadeOutCharacter}{fadeOutBg:600}{hideTextbox}{jump:First_Testimony_Start}{sectionEnd}

Final_Present_Evidence.name: Phoenix
Final_Present_Evidence.text: {courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{showLifeBar:2}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(The evidence that exposes Mr. Sahwit's contradiction{nl}is THIS!){p:500}{present:blog_post_charm_updated,CE3_Final_Right_Evidence,CE3_Final_Wrong_Evidence}{sectionEnd}

First_Testimony_Start.text: {courtChar:witness,Shawit}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{setState:currentTestimony,1}{setState:Mia_hint_condition,false}{courtView:witness}{checkpoint:First_Testimony_Start}{fadeInCharacter}{fadeInBg:600}{fadeInFg:600}{showTextbox}{blip:0,false}{center}{color:red}--The Situation at the Time of the Incident--{playAnimation:CrossExamination}{startCE:Yamano_Testimony_1}{sectionEnd}

Intro_Holding.name: Maya
Intro_Holding.text: {startBGM:lobby,false}{sprite:Maya["Normal"]}{fadeInCharacter}{blip:2}Nick, how are things looking?{nl}Aren't you nervous?

Intro_Holding.name: Phoenix
Intro_Holding.text: We are fully prepared.{nl}All that's left is to reveal the truth.

Intro_Holding.name: Phoenix
Intro_Holding.text: {blip:1,false}It's going to be fine.{nl}Leave it to me.

Intro_Holding.name: Phoenix
Intro_Holding.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(Alright, the trial is about to start.{nl}I'd better check the {color:red}Court Record{color:lightblue} one more time.)

Mia_Hint_1.name: Phoenix
Mia_Hint_1.text: {showTextbox}{hideLifeBar}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(This is bad...{p:200} What would Mia think{nl}in a situation like this?)

Mia_Hint_1.name: Mia
Mia_Hint_1.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Mia_Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInCharacter}{blip:2,true}{showTextbox}The defendant approached the victim without hesitation{nl}and pushed her...?

Mia_Hint_1.name: Mia
Mia_Hint_1.text: Could someone with such poor eyesight do that{nl}without 'that'?

Mia_Hint_2.name: Phoenix
Mia_Hint_2.text: {showTextbox}{hideLifeBar}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(This is bad...{p:200} What would Mia think{nl}in a situation like this?)

Mia_Hint_2.name: Mia
Mia_Hint_2.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Mia_Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInCharacter}{blip:2,true}{showTextbox}Phoenix, I feel like there's a little more{nl}hidden in her words.

Mia_Hint_2.name: Mia
Mia_Hint_2.text: If you ask for more details,{nl}you might start to see a contradiction!

Mia_Hint_3.name: Phoenix
Mia_Hint_3.text: {showTextbox}{hideLifeBar}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(This is bad...{p:200} What would Mia think{nl}in a situation like this?)

Mia_Hint_3.name: Mia
Mia_Hint_3.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Mia_Normal_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInCharacter}{blip:2,true}{showTextbox}Phoenix, I feel like there's a little more{nl}hidden in her words.

Mia_Hint_3.name: Mia
Mia_Hint_3.text: If you ask for more details,{nl}you might start to see a contradiction!

Press_Y1_0.name: Phoenix
Press_Y1_0.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtPan:defense}{blip:1,true}Why did you call the two of them there?

Press_Y1_0.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_0.text: {courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}Because the defendant and the victim were on bad terms{nl}and frequently had heated arguments.

Press_Y1_0.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_0.text: The two of them were...{p:200} well... so hostile towards each other that they could have started killing each other at any moment.

Press_Y1_0.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_0.text: However...{p:200}{nl}since they were both very dedicated to their work, it was a major headache for me as their supervisor.

Press_Y1_0.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_0.text: That is why I decided to step in and have them talk things out.

Press_Y1_1.name: Phoenix
Press_Y1_1.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtPan:defense}{blip:1,true}The meeting was on the 4th floor, right?{nl}Why did you wait on the 1st floor?

Press_Y1_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_1.text: {courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}The 1st-floor stage was the best place{nl}to sit and wait.

Press_Y1_1.name: Phoenix
Press_Y1_1.text: {courtView:defense}{blip:1}What time did you arrive at the 1st floor?

Press_Y1_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_1.text: {courtView:witness}I believe I sat down on the stage{nl}around 9:15 PM.

Press_Y1_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_1.text: I intended to stay on the 1st floor{nl}and go up to the 4th floor when the time came.

Press_Y1_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_1.text: But in the end,{nl} I never actually went up to the 4th floor that day.

Press_Y1_1.name: Phoenix
Press_Y1_1.text: {courtView:defense}You sat on the 1st floor at around 9:15 PM,{nl}and the meeting was at 10:00 PM.

Press_Y1_1.name: Phoenix
Press_Y1_1.text: What were you doing on the 1st floor for those 45 minutes?

Press_Y1_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_1.text: {courtView:witness}I was desperately trying to figure out how to improve their relationship.

Press_Y1_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_1.text: But I couldn't come up with any good ideas...{p:200}{nl}and before I knew it, it was 10:00 PM.

Press_Y1_2.name: Phoenix
Press_Y1_2.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtPan:defense}{blip:1,true}It must have been quite dark inside the building at the time.{nl}You could clearly see the two of them on the 4th floor?

Press_Y1_2.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_2.text: {courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}My eyesight is actually quite good.{nl}I have 20/20 vision in both eyes without glasses.

Press_Y1_2.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_2.text: However, I didn't identify them{nl}just by sight alone.

Press_Y1_2.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_2.text: Right when I thought about going up to the 4th floor,{nl}I heard women arguing.

Press_Y1_2.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_2.text: When I looked up, there were two silhouettes{nl}arguing near the 4th-floor railing...

Press_Y1_2.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_2.text: I immediately knew from their voices.{nl}That it was the defendant and the victim.

Press_Y1_2.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_2.text: But to my shame, I could only{nl}watch helplessly from the 1st floor...{p:300}

Press_Y1_3.name: Phoenix
Press_Y1_3.text: How did you know the defendant was the one who pushed her in that darkness?

Press_Y1_3.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_3.text: From their voices,{nl}I knew it was the victim and the defendantarguing on the 4th floor.

Press_Y1_3.name: Sahwit
Press_Y1_3.text: And the one who fell was the victim.{nl}Therefore, the one who pushed her must have been the defendant.

Press_Y2_0.name: Phoenix
Press_Y2_0.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{showCharacter}{courtView:defense}{blip:1,true}Did you really ready your camera instinctively?{nl}It seems a bit too well-prepared to me.

Press_Y2_0.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_0.text: Taking out a cell phone and putting it in camera mode{nl}isn't exactly a difficult task, you know.

Press_Y2_1.name: Phoenix
Press_Y2_1.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{showCharacter}{courtView:defense}{blip:1,true}What kind of argument did you hear?

Press_Y2_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_1.text: I heard the defendant's voice saying,{nl}'I told you to stop practicing after closing hours, pal!'

Press_Y2_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_1.text: Then the victim said, 'I'm not causing you any trouble,{nl}so stop nagging me!'

Press_Y2_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_1.text: Then the defendant yelled, 'If you won't listen,{nl}I'll just have to use force, pal!'

Press_Y2_1.name: Maggey
Press_Y2_1.text: {courtChar:witness,Maggey}{courtSprite:witness["Determined"]}{courtView:witness}{playSound:shake}{blip:2}That's a lie, sir!{nl}I never said a single word of that, sir!

Press_Y2_1.name: Maggey
Press_Y2_1.text: {playSound:shake}I mean, I didn't say anything at all;{nl}I just walked up to the railing, sir!

Press_Y2_1.name: Maggey
Press_Y2_1.text: {playSound:shake}Then I vaguely thought I saw someone there,{nl}so I just quietly called out to them, sir!

Press_Y2_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_1.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{courtChar:witness,Shawit}{courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{fadeInCharacter}{showTextbox}{blip:1}How pathetic.{nl}I clearly heard it with my own two ears.

Press_Y2_2.name: Phoenix
Press_Y2_2.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{showCharacter}{courtView:defense}{blip:1,true}Only the legs are visible in the photo.{nl}How can you be sure that it's the defendant?

Press_Y2_2.name: Edgeworth
Press_Y2_2.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}It's a fact that the defendant walked up to the railing.{nl}There is no doubt that these are the defendant's legs.

Press_Y2_2.name: Phoenix
Press_Y2_2.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(I don't have a comeback for that,{nl}but I'll try to put on a brave face.)

Press_Y2_2.name: Maya
Press_Y2_2.text: {color:white}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick.{nl}Just making a fierce face isn't going to cut it.

Press_Y2_2.name: Maya
Press_Y2_2.text: This is a courtroom,{nl}so you need to respond with your words.

Press_Y2_3.name: Phoenix
Press_Y2_3.text: The cause of death was a cerebral contusion{nl}from a severe blow to the back of the head!

Press_Y2_3.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_3.text: {courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}{blip:1}Ah, my apologies.{nl}This is a bit hard to understand without an explanation.

Press_Y2_3.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_3.text: The falling victim smashed{nl}face-first into the floor.

Press_Y2_3.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_3.text: The next moment, the impact caused her to flip over,{nl}and then she struck the back of her head severely.

Press_Y2_3.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_3.text: {courtView:witness}I hear the back of the head is more vulnerable to impact than the forehead. A cerebral contusion caused by hitting the back of the head is entirely possible.

Press_Y2_3.name: Sahwit
Press_Y2_3.text: It probably wasn't as strong as the initial impact,{nl}but it looked like quite a heavy blow.

Press_Y2_3.name: Judge
Press_Y2_3.text: {courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{courtView:judge}{blip:1}Hmm...{p:300} That is crucial information.{nl}Please add it to your testimony.

Press_Y2_4.name: Phoenix
Press_Y2_4.text: {courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(The injury on the back of the victim's head{nl}couldn't have happened like that...)

Press_Y2_4.name: Phoenix
Press_Y2_4.text: {color:lightblue}(If the testimony is true, then there's a massive{nl}contradiction with THAT piece of evidence!)

Press_Y2_4.name: Phoenix
Press_Y2_4.text: {courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{color:white}{blip:1}Your Honor. The defense is ready to present a piece of evidence that exposes the contradiction in the testimony.

Press_Y2_4.name: Phoenix
Press_Y2_4.text: {courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(If I nail this,{nl}the tide should completely turn in our favor...)

Press_Y3_0.name: Judge
Press_Y3_0.text: {courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Shake_Head"]}{courtSprite:judge["Stern"]}That's enough, you two.{nl}This is going nowhere.

Press_Y3_1.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_1.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtPan:defense}{blip:1,true}To clear up these suspicions,{nl}could you speak in more detail?

Press_Y3_1.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_1.text: About the blank 50 minutes between 9:15 PM{nl}and the incident, {p:250}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}in full detail!{shake:250}{playSound:bubble_sfx}

Press_Y3_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_1.text: I was entirely focused on thinking about{nl}how to mend the relationship between the victim and the defendant.

Press_Y3_1.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_1.text: {hideTextbox}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{showTextbox}{flash}{playSound:question1}Are you sure?{nl}You didn't do something like worry about your hair?

Press_Y3_1.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_1.text: {hideTextbox}{courtView:witness}{courtSprite:witness["Damage"]}{courtSprite:witness["Nervous"]}{showTextbox}W-What are you talking about?{nl}That makes no sense!

Press_Y3_2.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_2.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{courtPan:defense}{p:100}{courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{showTextbox}{blip:1,true}Do you have any proof that you didn't go there?{nl}You don't, do you?

Press_Y3_2.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_2.text: {courtSprite:witness["Nervous"]}{courtView:witness}I-I certainly do!{nl}The sequence of photos I showed you earlier!

Press_Y3_2.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_2.text: {courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}If you look at those, it's obvious{nl}that I was on the 1st floor!

Press_Y3_2.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_2.text: {hideTextbox}{courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Slamming_Bench"]}{courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}{showTextbox}{blip:1}That only serves as proof{nl}for around 10:05 PM!

Press_Y3_2.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_2.text: What about the time before that?

Press_Y3_2.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_2.text: {courtView:witness}Just as I said!{nl}I was on the 1st floor the entire time before that too!

Press_Y3_2.name: Judge
Press_Y3_2.text: {courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{blip:1}Hmm... That is crucial information.{nl}Please add it to your testimony.

Press_Y3_3.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_3.text: {playSound:PhoenixHoldIt}{playAnimation:HoldIt}{showTextbox}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{courtPan:defense}{blip:1,true}A noise loud enough for the showering defendant to hear,{nl}and it only happened once...?

Press_Y3_3.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_3.text: {courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{courtView:defense}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(If the victim fell twice,{nl}there should have been two loud noises...)

Press_Y3_3.name: Edgeworth
Press_Y3_3.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}{courtView:prosecution}{blip:1}Defense. The volume of a sound depends on the situation! The second impact could have been muffled by the shower.

Press_Y3_3.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_3.text: {courtSprite:witness["Stand"]}{courtView:witness}The prosecutor speaks the truth.{nl}Besides, if there had been two loud sounds...

Press_Y3_3.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_3.text: There is no way I wouldn't have noticed from the 1st floor.

Press_Y3_3.name: Maya
Press_Y3_3.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick, don't let them talk you down!

Press_Y3_4.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_4.text: {courtSprite:witness["Nervous"]}{courtView:witness}B-Because it is firmly{nl}etched into my head!

Press_Y3_4.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_4.text: {courtView:defense}Into that head with the hair{shake:300}{playSound:hit2}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}that twitches so unnaturally!?

Press_Y3_4.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_4.text: {courtView:witness}{shake:300}{playSound:shake}W-What are you saying!{nl}It is etched into my memory!

Press_Y3_4.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_4.text: I will repeat myself!{nl}Between 9:15 PM and the incident, there was not a single strange...

Press_Y3_4.name: Sahwit
Press_Y3_4.text: Between 9:15 PM and the incident,{nl}there was not a single strange occurrence!

Press_Y3_4.name: Phoenix
Press_Y3_4.text: {courtView:defense}Your Honor, the defense wishes to present evidence{nl}pointing out the contradiction in that testimony.

Second_Testimony_Start.name: Sahwit
Second_Testimony_Start.text: {showTestimonyIndicator}{hideTextbox}{hideCharacter}{fadeBg:Byrde_Samurai,400}{showTextbox}{startBGM:interrogatory_moderato,false}{blip:1}This is the sequence of photos{nl}I took at that moment.

Second_Testimony_Start.name: Sahwit
Second_Testimony_Start.text: I heard voices arguing,{nl}so I instinctively took out my cell phone and took some pictures.

Second_Testimony_Start.name: Sahwit
Second_Testimony_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeBg:Byrde_Samurai2,400}{showTextbox}Here, please look.{nl}The defendant is pushing the victim as she sits on the railing.

Second_Testimony_Start.name: Sahwit
Second_Testimony_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeBg:Byrde_Samurai3,400}{showTextbox}From the looks of it,{nl}the victim must have landed face-first on the ground.

Second_Testimony_Start.name: Edgeworth
Second_Testimony_Start.text: {hideTestimonyIndicator}{hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg:600}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{stopBGM}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident2"]}{courtView:prosecution}{fadeInBg:600}{fadeInCharacter:600}{blip:1}{showTextbox}Well?{nl}Do you not think this is an obvious case of murder?

Second_Testimony_Start.name: Maya
Second_Testimony_Start.text: {courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}{courtView:cocounsel}{blip:2}Nick, you can't lose your nerve.{nl}We have to keep pushing forward for Maggey's sake!

Second_Testimony_Start.name: Maya
Second_Testimony_Start.text: No matter how tough the situation is,{nl}there has to be a clue somewhere!

Third_Testimony_Start.name: Sahwit
Third_Testimony_Start.text: {showTestimonyIndicator}{startBGM:interrogatory_alegro}{blip:1}I finished my work around 9:15 PM,{nl}and after that, I stayed on the 1st-floor stage the entire time.

Third_Testimony_Start.name: Sahwit
Third_Testimony_Start.text: I finished my work around 9:15 PM,{nl}and after that, I stayed on the 1st-floor stage the entire time.

Third_Testimony_Start.name: Sahwit
Third_Testimony_Start.text: You might suspect me, but{nl}you are making a massive misunderstanding.

Third_Testimony_Start.name: Sahwit
Third_Testimony_Start.text: I never went to the 4th floor.

Third_Testimony_Start.name: Sahwit
Third_Testimony_Start.text: There is no way{nl}I could have pushed anyone.

Third_Testimony_Start.name: Maya
Third_Testimony_Start.text: {hideTestimonyIndicator}{stopBGM}{courtSprite:cocounsel["Strict_Bench"]}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{fadeOutBg:600}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInCharacter:600}{fadeInBg:600}{blip:2}Nick, what should we do?{nl}His testimony is so vague...

Trial_GameOver.name: Judge
Trial_GameOver.text: The court will not allow any further presentation of evidence.

Trial_GameOver.name: Judge
Trial_GameOver.text: The defense's counterarguments lack the power{nl}to overturn the prosecution's claims!

Trial_GameOver.name: Judge
Trial_GameOver.text: I will now pass down the verdict{nl}on the defendant, Maggey Byrde, right here.

Trial_GameOver.name: Judge
Trial_GameOver.text: {showTextbox}The defendant shall be remanded into custody{nl}immediately,

Trial_GameOver.name: Judge
Trial_GameOver.text: and shall undergo a standard trial{nl}at the High Court within one month.
